adapter_feedback: Evaluator feedback: keep the candidate scoped to one declared technique component; preserve safe-signal discipline; require controls, replay, contamination rule-out, budget awareness, and a one-sentence claim test. Do not mutate scorers, oracles, gold, budgets, casebooks, or vulnerability cards. No live target behavior is available in this shadow campaign. New technique should be conservative, evidence-anchored, and useful across vuln cards without becoming a payload library.
summary: GEPA optimize_anything produced a text variant for the declared component.
note: Trace intentionally stores hashes and summaries, not raw secrets or live engagement data.
